code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test18-SEP-2020Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, mild ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), but no hematuria or leukocyturia. These findings are consistent with possible renal dysfunction, such as glomerular or tubular pathology. Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
